title: verbascum josgadense
intro: Verbascum josgadense, also known as Josgaden's mullein, is a type of flowering plant in the figwort family, native to Ireland. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is also used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and digestive problems, offering health benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and relief from pain. The herbal preparations of Verbascum josgadense typically involve drying the leaves and flowers, then using them to make teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
